data.title: Bitwise Launches ETF Tracking Firms With Over 1,000 Bitcoin
data.description: Crypto asset manager Bitwise Asset Management, overseeing $12 billion in client assets, has announced the launched the Bitwise Bitcoin Standard Corporations ETF (NYSE:OWNB) on NYSE Arca, targeting companies holding at least 1,000 Bitcoin (CRYPTO:

data.title: Salesforce Doubles Down On AI With $1 Billion Investment In Singapore Over Next 5 Years
data.description: Salesforce Inc. (NYSE: CRM) has committed to invest $1 billion in the country's AI sector over the next five years. The investment is aimed at promoting the adoption of Salesforce's AI product, Agentforce.

data.title: Porsche AG To Cut 3,900 Jobs, Warns Of Challenging Market Conditions
data.description: Porsche AG is implementing a major restructuring plan to improve efficiency and long-term financial success. The company aims to cut 1,900 jobs by 2029 through natural turnover and a strict hiring policy. Additionally, 2,000 roles will be eliminated through the expiration of fixed-term contracts.

data.title: Alibaba's Joseph Tsai Says 'Everyone Is Concerned About Tariffs,' As He Expects Levies On Chinese EVs
data.description: Alibaba chairperson, Joseph Tsai said that everyone was concerned about the tariff battle between the economic powerhouses of the world.

data.title: JD.COM's Logistics Unit Triples Annual Profit On Supply Chain Upgrades
data.description: JD Logistics, the logistics arm of e-commerce giant JD.com, tripled its annual profit , thanks to its upgraded supply chain solutions.
